title: SPOTLIGHT
lyrics:
[소코도모 "SPOTLIGHT" Feat. LEX 가사]

[Chorus]
Hitting my spotlight, spotlight on this girl
She put up her hand and V
She be like fine wine, fine wine
Mixing up just right
Eat it up with some Cheese
Look at that inside outside
Watching her smile
She making me feel so free
Give me that S line V line
Everything so fine
Why did I know you baby
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
We mixing all together
Like an auto-bot
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
You better than forever
You’re making me feel so right

[Verse 1]
I’m like “hey”
“What’s up, baby?”
반짝이는 너가 끌리네
다른 빛들과는 다르게 쎄게 네게
쿵~ 하며
넌 조금 색다른 느낌을 줬어
어디서 왔어?
널 처음 보지만 심장이 막 두근
완벽한 널 가지고 말거야

[Pre-Chorus]
She got the groove, the moves
You nеver even seen bеfore (HOLY)
사랑을 나누고 싶어지는 여자는 너뿐이었지
너에게 한 눈에 반한 거 맞아
손잡고 박수를 치면서 가자
너만 내 곁에 있어준다면
난 행복해

[Chorus]
Hitting my spotlight, spotlight on this girl
She put up her hand and V
She be like fine wine, fine wine
Mixing up just right
Eat it up with some Cheese
Look at that inside outside
Watching her smile
She making me feel so free
Give me that S line V line
Everything so fine
Why did I know you baby
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
We mixing all together
Like an auto-bot
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
You better than forever
You’re making me feel so right

[Verse 2]
だっさいbaby
実際heavy
一体全体どうなってる
I can’t keep yo my mind
I can’t keep yo my mind
だっさいbaby
実際heavy
一体全体どうなってる
I can’t keep yo my mind
I can’t keep yo my mind
I’m in spotlight, spotlight, spotlight
他にいない
お互いに気になる子で止まり
かわいいね
君も
ごめん君も
キャッシングで遊ぼう
馬鹿な事

[Chorus]
Hitting my spotlight, spotlight on this girl
She put up her hand and V
She be like fine wine, fine wine
Mixing up just right
Eat it up with some Cheese
Look at that inside outside
Watching her smile
She making me feel so free
Give me that S line V line
Everything so fine
Why did I know you baby
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
We mixing all together
Like an auto-bot
1, 2, 3, hit the spotlight
You better than forever
You’re making me feel so right
